name: CRUD Data Barang - Tambah, Edit, Hapus, Filter Kategori, Search
description: Test CRUD data barang lengkap: tambah barang, search, filter kategori, edit, hapus. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
User redirected to dashboard
Navigate to /products
Data Barang page is visible with products table
Click Tambah Barang button to open create modal
Create barang modal is open
Fill nama barang with 'Barang CRUD Test', fill SKU with 'SKU-CRUD-001', select a category from dropdown, select a unit, fill harga beli, fill harga jual, fill stok minimum, then click Simpan
'Barang CRUD Test' appears in the products table
Type 'Barang CRUD Test' in the search input
Table filtered showing only Barang CRUD Test
Click the category filter dropdown and select a category
Table shows only products from selected category
Clear filters and click Ubah button on Barang CRUD Test row
Edit modal opens with current data prefilled
Change nama to 'Barang CRUD Test Updated' and click Simpan
Product name updated to Barang CRUD Test Updated
Click Hapus button on Barang CRUD Test Updated row
Confirmation modal appears
Click confirm Hapus in the modal
Barang CRUD Test Updated removed from table
